scripts.be:redis:up: docker start redis || docker run -d --name redis -p 6379:6379 redis:7
scripts.be:celery:worker: bash -lc "cd apps/backend && PYTHONPATH=src celery -A src.celery_app.celery_app worker -Q sniff -l info --concurrency 2"
scripts.be:celery:beat: bash -lc "cd apps/backend && PYTHONPATH=src celery -A src.celery_app.celery_app beat -l info"
scripts.be:sniff:all+beat: concurrently -k -n API,REDIS,CELERY,BEAT "pnpm dev:backend" "pnpm be:redis:up" "pnpm be:celery:worker" "pnpm be:celery:beat"
